message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.ma.argmax + numpy.ma.argmin wrappers (br-franken_numpy-np8j, br-franken_numpy-7knr)

Expose fnp_python.ma_argmax and ma_argmin delegating to numpy.ma.argmax
and numpy.ma.argmin. These respect the MaskedArray mask so masked
positions are ignored when finding the extremum index.

Joint parity oracle test covers:
- 1-D masked array: mask shadows a would-be max / a would-be min
- 2-D explicit axis=0 argmax + argmin
- keepdims=True shape parity on axis=1
- axis=None flatten semantics
